name: IG 教學卡範例（5 張）

payload.headline: UI/UX Pro Max
payload.body: Give it your project brief and it generates a complete design system, palette, font pairing, style direction, and UX rules.

payload.headline: Understand the Nodes
payload.sub: These START and CONTROL your workflow:

items.title: Manual Trigger
items.body: You click a button to run it yourself

items.title: Webhook
items.body: Receives data from any external app instantly

items.title: Schedule Trigger
items.body: Runs your workflow at a set time

items.title: IF Node
items.body: Checks a condition, sends data down true or false path

items.title: Switch
items.body: Like IF but routes into multiple different paths

items.title: Split in Batches
items.body: Repeats an action for every item in a list

items.title: Wait
items.body: Pauses the workflow for X seconds/minutes

payload.headline: Save These Marketplaces For Claude Skills
payload.annotation: → You can download as many skills as you want here!

steps.title: Screenshot
steps.body: Start with a screenshot. Drag it into Claude and say 'Build me something that looks like this.'

steps.title: Prompting
steps.body: Describe the end result, never the steps.

steps.title: Context
steps.body: Point Claude to your files. Don't re-explain — just point.

steps.title: Workflow
steps.body: One step at a time. Each conversation is a sprint.

payload.headline: Pack Shot Generation
payload.body: One product photo → AI generates multiple angles/views using image gen models (Nano Banana 2/Pro), auto-saved into SKU folders.
